eval_cases.expected_behavior: Runs the Seed Gate, calls socrates only if the top-level ## Seed is missing or incomplete, then iterates evolve-step and ontology until convergence or safety valve.

eval_cases.query: 이미 Seed가 있는데 사각지대 후보만 검토해줘
eval_cases.expected_behavior: Route to evolve-step because the user only needs Seed blind-spot review.
Route to ontology because the user only needs semantic boundary definition.

eval_cases.query: 하네스로 돌려줘. ontology가 비슷해질 때까지 확인하면서 seed 닫아줘
eval_cases.expected_behavior: Runs the semi-automatic harness and asks the user for adoption and boundary-equivalence decisions.
